aeo_readiness.summary: Advantech Air has a strong foundation for AI visibility but lacks conversational content and structured data to maximize AI citations.
quick_wins: Implement FAQPage schema with common HVAC questions and answers.
Add HowTo schema for common HVAC maintenance and repair processes.

gbp_analysis.summary: Google Business Profile is well-optimized with high ratings, photos, and accurate information.
critical_issues: No recent posts or updates on GBP.

nap_citations.summary: NAP consistency is perfect with no issues detected.

schema_gaps: LocalBusiness schema lacks detailed service descriptions

ai_visibility_gap.primary_gap: Lack of conversational content and structured data limits AI model citations.
ai_visibility_gap.invisible_for: Queries related to HVAC maintenance tips and troubleshooting.
ai_visibility_gap.low_hanging_fruit: Implementing FAQPage schema with HVAC-specific Q&A.
ai_visibility_gap.authority_opportunity: Creating in-depth content on HVAC energy efficiency and local Jacksonville climate considerations.

agency_pitch.hook: Unlock AI-driven leads by becoming the go-to HVAC expert in Jacksonville.
agency_pitch.pain_point: Without AI-ready content and structured data, they miss out on 40% of potential leads from AI assistants.
agency_pitch.proof_point: Competitors with FAQ and HowTo schema consistently appear in AI search results for HVAC queries.
agency_pitch.solution: Our AEO approach integrates structured data, conversational content, and authority-building strategies to make Advantech Air the top choice for AI assistants.
agency_pitch.impact_estimate: Expect a 30-40% increase in AI-driven leads within 3 months.
agency_pitch.urgency: Waiting means losing ground to competitors who are already optimizing for AI search.

email_subject_line: Advantech Air: Are You Ready for the AI-Driven Future of HVAC Leads?
opening_line: After analyzing your website, it's clear you have the foundation for success, but there's a crucial gap in AI readiness.
cta: Let's schedule a call to discuss how we can optimize your site for AI search and boost your lead generation.
